title: Musk Criticizes Nolan's 'Odyssey' for Not Being Faithful to the Original Book, Then Tells Grok to Imagine Making a Movie of Its Own
excerpt: A sentence of dissatisfaction turned into a compulsory assignment for an AI video. According to reports, Musk was dissatisfied with Christopher Nolan's adaptati
content_html:
A sentence of dissatisfaction turned into a compulsory assignment for an AI video. According to reports, Musk was dissatisfied with Christopher Nolan's adaptation and casting of his new film "Odyssey," and posted on the social platform X that he would use his own Grok Imagine to create a movie more faithful to Homer's original "Odyssey."

This statement directly brought the aesthetic debate about classic adaptations into the field of AI-generated content. When someone is unsatisfied with the interpretation of a Hollywood director, instead of writing a review, they first think of letting a text-to-video model re-film it themselves. This approach itself is a small footnote showing how AI creation tools are penetrating mass cultural production.

Grok Imagine, as the video generation capability under xAI, whether it can truly produce a work comparable to cinema quality and closer to the epic original is still just an idea in Musk's words. However, "re-doing it with AI" is becoming an increasingly accessible way to respond.

According to reports, Musk was dissatisfied with Christopher Nolan's adaptation and casting of his new film "Odyssey," and posted on the social platform X that he would use his own Grok Imagine to create a movie more faithful to Homer's original "Odyssey."

sentences.en: A sentence of dissatisfaction turned into a compulsory assignment for an AI video.
sentences.zh: 一句不满，变成了一段AI视频的必修课。

sentences.en: According to reports, Musk was dissatisfied with Christopher Nolan's adaptation and casting of his new film "Odyssey," and posted on the social platform X that he would use his own Grok Imagine to create a movie more faithful to Homer's original "Odyssey."
sentences.zh: 据报道，马斯克对克里斯托弗·诺兰对自己的新片《奥德赛》的改编和选角不满意，并在社交平台X上发帖称，他将用自己的Grok Imagine来创作一部更忠实于荷马原著《奥德赛》的电影。

blocks.html_en: This statement directly brought the aesthetic debate about classic adaptations into the field of AI-generated content. When someone is unsatisfied with the interpretation of a Hollywood director, instead of writing a review, they first think of letting a text-to-video model re-film it themselves. This approach itself is a small footnote showing how AI creation tools are penetrating mass cultural production.

sentences.en: This statement directly brought the aesthetic debate about classic adaptations into the field of AI-generated content.
sentences.zh: 这一说法直接将经典改编的审美争论带入了人工智能生成内容领域。

sentences.en: When someone is unsatisfied with the interpretation of a Hollywood director, instead of writing a review, they first think of letting a text-to-video model re-film it themselves.
sentences.zh: 当有人对好莱坞导演的诠释不满意时，他们首先想到的不是写评论，而是让文字转视频的模特自己重新拍摄。

sentences.en: This approach itself is a small footnote showing how AI creation tools are penetrating mass cultural production.
sentences.zh: 这种方法本身就是一个小脚注，展示了人工智能创作工具如何渗透大众文化生​​产。

blocks.html_en: Grok Imagine, as the video generation capability under xAI, whether it can truly produce a work comparable to cinema quality and closer to the epic original is still just an idea in Musk's words. However, "re-doing it with AI" is becoming an increasingly accessible way to respond.

sentences.en: Grok Imagine, as the video generation capability under xAI, whether it can truly produce a work comparable to cinema quality and closer to the epic original is still just an idea in Musk's words.
sentences.zh: Grok 想象一下，作为 xAI 下的视频生成能力，能否真正制作出媲美影院品质、更接近史诗原作的作品，用马斯克的话来说，仍然只是一个想法。

sentences.en: However, "re-doing it with AI" is becoming an increasingly accessible way to respond.
sentences.zh: 然而，“用人工智能重做”正在成为一种越来越容易实现的应对方式。

content_html_zh:
一句不满，变成了一段AI视频的必修课。 据报道，马斯克对克里斯托弗·诺兰对自己的新片《奥德赛》的改编和选角不满意，并在社交平台X上发帖称，他将用自己的Grok Imagine来创作一部更忠实于荷马原著《奥德赛》的电影。

这一说法直接将经典改编的审美争论带入了人工智能生成内容领域。 当有人对好莱坞导演的诠释不满意时，他们首先想到的不是写评论，而是让文字转视频的模特自己重新拍摄。 这种方法本身就是一个小脚注，展示了人工智能创作工具如何渗透大众文化生​​产。

Grok 想象一下，作为 xAI 下的视频生成能力，能否真正制作出媲美影院品质、更接近史诗原作的作品，用马斯克的话来说，仍然只是一个想法。 然而，“用人工智能重做”正在成为一种越来越容易实现的应对方式。
